$comment: Pinned Inkdrop note IDs for the project's tracking notebook. Ownership model: the repo owns public/code-coupled docs (README, docs/, CHANGELOG); the notebook owns tracking (roadmap states, release traceability). Nothing is mirrored. Agents: address notes by these IDs (never search-and-guess).

roadmap.title: Ink-Presentation - Roadmap
roadmap.owns: v2 backlog tracking: states, research notes, progress log

touchpoints: Shipping a roadmap item: update CHANGELOG.md (repo) AND roadmap + releaseLog notes in the same session
Material scope change: refresh the short 'Planned features' list in README.md
